corners.name: Tamburello
corners.notes: Historic chicane site. Was a flat-out corner before the 1994 modifications. Now a chicane.

corners.name: Villeneuve
corners.notes: Named after Gilles Villeneuve. Tight right-hander, overtaking possible.

corners.name: Acque Minerali
corners.notes: Right-left chicane with a bump at entry.

corners.name: Rivazza 1
corners.notes: Double-apex Rivazza complex. Overtaking possible under braking.

corners.name: Variante Bassa
corners.notes: Final chicane before S/F straight. Banked exit.
